Premium Double Room

Double

Rating: (0.0)
0 reviews

Description

Spacious room with two comfortable beds and modern amenities including air conditioning, high-speed WiFi, LED TV, and an attached bathroom with hot water. Ideal for couples or friends traveling together.

Amenities

Air Conditioning
Free Wi-Fi
LED TV
Attached Bathroom
Hot Water
Room Service
Mini Fridge
